chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1108 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 27.02.2020 Mr. Ubedullah Malano, Advocate for respondents No.5, 7 & 8. Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Petitioner and his counsel are called absent. On the date of filing of the petition, counsel for the petitioner was directed to satisfy the Court about the maintainability of the petition and notices were issued to the respondents subject to the maintainability of the petition. On 20.08.2019, once again counsel for the petitioner was directed to satisfy the Court about the maintainability of the petition. SSP Khairpur has filed comments. Since the maintainability of the petition is questionable, none appeared for the petitioner. Apparently, petitioner is no more interested. Now, it is 11:00 a.m. The petition is dismissed on account of non-prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
